memoryArtifacts.headline: Count Berengar II of Sulzbach (c. 1080-83-3 December 1125)
memoryArtifacts.description: Count Berengar II of Sulzbach (c. 1080-83-3 December 1125), sometimes known as Berengar I of Sulzbach, was Count of Sulzbach in Bavaria. Berengar was a leader of the reform party. He sided with Pope G …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Berengar II. von Sulzbach於大約1080年出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇艾爾茲比斯圖姆 麥音素爾茲巴賀 (陶努)時，他的父親Gebhard II. von Sulzbach27歲，母親Irmgard von Rott18歲。他和Adelheid von Wolfratshausen-Dießen至少有1個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1125年12月3日在德國巴登-爾特波格可萊斯 洛拉賀洛拉賀享年46歲，埋葬在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇艾爾茲比斯圖姆 麥音素爾茲巴賀 (陶努)。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Berengar II. von Sulzbach于大约1080年出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇艾爾茲比斯圖姆 麥音素爾茲巴賀 (陶努)时，他的父亲Gebhard II. von Sulzbach27岁，母亲Irmgard von Rott18岁。他和Adelheid von Wolfratshausen-Dießen至少有1个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1125年12月3日在德国巴登-爾特波格可萊斯 洛拉賀洛拉賀享年46岁，埋葬在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇艾爾茲比斯圖姆 麥音素爾茲巴賀 (陶努)。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Sulzbach
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Horst.
German and Jewish (western Ashkenazic): habitational name from any of the many places called Sulzbach.

nameMeanings.name: Berengar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Berringer  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Beringer
meanings: German; French (Béringer): from the ancient Germanic personal name Beringari, Beringer, composed of the elements bern ‘bear’ + ger ‘spear’. Compare French Belanger and Berenger .
German: habitational name for someone from any of several paces called Behringen or Böhringen in Baden-Württemberg and Bayern. Compare   Baringer  ,   Behringer  ,   Berringer  , and   Boehringer  .
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Berringer  .

variants.name: Berenguer
meanings: Spanish and French (southern; Bérenguer): from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements ber ‘bear’ + ger ‘spear’, a cognate of French Bérenger (see Berenger ) and Béringer (see Beringer ).

nameMeanings.name: II.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Berengar II. von Sulzbach was born about 1080, in Sulzbach (Taunus), Erzbistum Mainz, Holy Roman Empire, his father, Gebhard II. von Sulzbach, was 27 and his mother, Irmgard von Rott, was 18. He had at least 1 son and 4 daughters with Adelheid von Wolfratshausen-Dießen. He died on 3 December 1125, in Lörrach, Kreis Lörrach, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, at the age of 46, and was buried in Sulzbach (Taunus), Erzbistum Mainz, Holy Roman Empire.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Berengar II. von Sulzbach est né environ 1080, à Sulzbach (Taunus), Erzbistum Mainz, Saint-Empire romain, son père, Gebhard II. von Sulzbach, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Irmgard von Rott, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles avec Adelheid von Wolfratshausen-Dießen. Il est décédé le 3 décembre 1125, à Lörrach, Kreis Lörrach, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Sulzbach (Taunus), Erzbistum Mainz, Saint-Empire romain.

de.lifeSummary: Als Berengar II. von Sulzbach um 1080 in Sulzbach (Taunus), Erzbistum Mainz, Heiliges Römisches Reich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gebhard II. von Sulzbach 27 und seine Mutter Irmgard von Rott 18. Er hatte mit Adelheid von Wolfratshausen-Dießen mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 3. Dezember 1125 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Lörrach, Kreis Lörrach, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland und wurde in Sulzbach (Taunus), Erzbistum Mainz, Heiliges Römisches Reich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Berengar II. von Sulzbach è nato il circa 1080 nel Sulzbach (Taunus), Erzbistum Mainz, Heiliges Römisches Reich, il suo padre, Gebhard II. von Sulzbach, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Irmgard von Rott, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie con Adelheid von Wolfratshausen-Dießen. Morì il 3 dicembre 1125, nel Lörrach, Kreis Lörrach, Baden-Württemberg, Germania, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Sulzbach (Taunus), Erzbistum Mainz, Heiliges Römisches Reich.

ko.Sulzbach, Aichach, Aichach-Friedberg, Ba: 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 아이차ch-프리드버그 아이차치 설즈바치
ko.Sulzbach (Taunus), Erzbistum Mainz, Sain: 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 르즈비스투 맹츠 설즈바치 (타누스)
ko.lifeSummary: Berengar II. von Sulzbach(이)가 대략 1080년 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 르즈비스투 맹츠 설즈바치 (타누스)에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gebhard II. von Sulzbach(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Irmgard von Rott(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Adelheid von Wolfratshausen-Dießen(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1125년 12월 3일 독일 바데-wu르테버그 크레이스 o라치 o라치에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 르즈비스투 맹츠 설즈바치 (타누스)에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Berengar II. von Sulzbach nasceu aproximadamente 1080, em Sulzbach (Taunus), Erzbistum Mainz, Heiliges Römisches Reich, seu pai, Gebhard II. von Sulzbach, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Irmgard von Rott, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas com Adelheid von Wolfratshausen-Dießen. Ele faleceu em 3 de dezembro de 1125, em Lörrach, Kreis Lörrach, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Sulzbach (Taunus), Erzbistum Mainz, Heiliges Römisches Reich.

ru.Sulzbach (Taunus), Erzbistum Mainz, Sain: сулзбач (таунус), эрзбистум меинз, хилигесь рoмищесь раич
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Berengar II. von Sulzbach родился около 1080 г. в местности сулзбач (таунус), эрзбистум меинз, хилигесь рoмищесь раич, его отцу по имени Gebhard II. von Sulzbach было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Irmgard von Rott, 18. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери от Adelheid von Wolfratshausen-Dießen. Он умер 3 декабря 1125 г. в местности лoррэич, крис лoррэич, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности сулзбач (таунус), эрзбистум меинз, хилигесь рoмищесь раич.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Berengar II. von Sulzbach nació aproximadamente 1080, en Sulzbach (Taunus), Erzbistum Mainz, Heiliges Römisches Reich, su papá, Gebhard II. von Sulzbach, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Irmgard von Rott, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas con Adelheid von Wolfratshausen-Dießen. Murió el 3 de diciembre de 1125, en Lörrach, Kreis Lörrach, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Sulzbach (Taunus), Erzbistum Mainz, Heiliges Römisches Reich.
